title: The Ten Second Collaboration
description:
3 years ago today, I'D SAY HE'S HOT ON OUR TAIL, was uploaded on the magical internets.
And... the rest is history!


So to celebrate this, a whole bunch of us made a video consisting of a bunch of smaller 10 second video chunklets.
